overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a stealth video game showing a bald agent in a dark coat navigating through an industrial facility. The character moves from a ground floor lobby up a concrete stairwell with red emergency lighting, through corridors with large windows showing a dusk sky, and into an office area with medical personnel in blue protective suits.

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby toward the staircase, passing a person in blue protective gear

notable_agents.action: person in blue hazmat suit looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: large structural concrete pillar in the center of the lobby
metal staircase with concrete steps leading upward
red illuminated exit sign above the stairwell entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit concrete lobby where the character approaches a staircase. A person in blue protective clothing stands to the right looking at a device. The environment features industrial concrete pillars and metal railings with a red exit sign visible above the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with red emergency lighting

events.description: enters the stairwell from the ground floor lobby

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs in the dimly lit stairwell

entered.detail: bare concrete walls of the stairwell enclosure
continuous metal handrail along the stairwell wall
red emergency lighting casting a crimson glow on the walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow concrete stairwell illuminated by red emergency lighting. The walls are bare concrete with metal handrails as the character ascends the stairs, leaving the lobby behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor corridor with industrial windows

events.description: exits stairwell into corridor with large windows
lighting shifts from red artificial to mixed natural light from windows

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor passing large industrial windows showing the dusk sky outside

entered.detail: large multi-paned industrial windows showing reddish dusk sky outside
electrical boxes and conduits mounted on the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell, the character enters a corridor with large industrial windows on the right revealing a reddish dusk sky. The lighting changes from red emergency lights to a mix of natural sunset and artificial light as the character moves past concrete pillars and wall-mounted equipment.

events.description: moves from windowed corridor into inner storage corridor
approaches doorway leading to interior room

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow corridor lined with wooden crates and storage boxes

entered.detail: stacked wooden crates and barriers lining the corridor
exposed pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
open doorway leading to an interior room with visible lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves into an inner corridor away from the windows, passing through a storage area with wooden crates and cardboard boxes stacked along the walls. Exposed industrial pipes run along the ceiling as the character approaches an open doorway leading to a lit interior room.

scene_state.functional_zone: office or medical room with work tables

events.description: enters the interior room from the storage corridor
turns slightly to survey the room while moving toward the center

agents.ego_description: entering and surveying the room, moving past tables where personnel are working

notable_agents.action: person in blue protective suit sitting on a table
person in blue protective suit working at a desk

entered.detail: metal work table in the center of the room
overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the room
medical or laboratory equipment and supplies
window showing red emergency light from outside

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious interior room that appears to be a medical or office area, illuminated by fluorescent ceiling lights. Two people in blue protective suits are present—one sitting on a metal table and another working at a desk. The room contains office furniture, medical equipment, and coat hooks on the walls, with a window showing red emergency lighting from outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial lobby through a series of utilitarian corridors and into a brightly lit medical office. It begins in a concrete lobby where the character passes a figure in blue protective clothing before ascending a narrow stairwell bathed in red emergency lighting. As the character exits the stairs, the oppressive red glow shifts into a mix of artificial light and the reddish hues of a dusk sky visible through large industrial windows. The scene then moves away from the glass and through a storage area filled with wooden crates and ceiling pipes before turning toward an open doorway. Finally, the camera enters a spacious interior room illuminated by fluorescent lights, revealing medical equipment and personnel in blue suits working amidst office furniture.
